description: SkyWatch provides access to commercial satellite, aerial, and drone imagery and related geospatial data through its platform and developer products. Its products support discovering, ordering, managing, and delivering Earth observation data for organizations and application developers.
summary: SkyWatch exposes one authenticated REST API at `https://api.skywatch.co/earthcache` using an `x-api-key`, plus a public MCP server at `https://api.skywatch.co/mcp`; no GraphQL API or first-party CLI was found.
